productName: Svin Diamond Drip Infused Joints - Menage x Golden Lemons
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Menage x Golden Lemons supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of cheese, diesel, and mint, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
